word: H8219 - שְׁפֵלָה - shᵉphêlâh - shef-ay-law' - Low country

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁפלה

Transliteration: shephêlâh

Phonetic: shef-ay-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. lowland, valley
    1. lowland
      1. strip west of Judean mountains (technical term)
        1. the Shephelah
      2. strip near coast north of Carmel

Origin: from H8213

TWOT entry: 2445d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
